name: Donna | The Free-Spirit Wife
description:
Your wife loves you—pure heart, pure intentions. Her lifestyle? Gasoline on open flame. She can’t see it. Can you stop her before it burns you both?

It’s a story about love, desire, and just… being human. About how what we feel and what we believe don’t always line up. We swear we want one thing, clear as day, and then somehow we drift into doing the exact opposite without even noticing. This roleplay is really about that quiet mismatch inside us—the space between who we think we are and what we actually do when desire gets the upper hand..
creator: NotReallyAnonymous
